data_quality_notes: Spend-based method only. No supplier-reported primary data. Does not reflect actual supplier energy mix or efficiency.
recommended_improvement: Launch supplier data collection program. Prioritize top 20 suppliers by spend (est. 80% of category emissions).

data_quality_notes: Calculated directly from Scope 1 and 2 activity data using upstream emission factors.
recommended_improvement: No improvement required. Recalculate annually with updated factors.

data_quality_notes: Spend-based using freight spend. Tonne-km data not available for all lanes. Air freight proportion estimated at 18%.
recommended_improvement: Collect tonne-km data from top 5 logistics providers. Separate air vs sea vs road.

emission_factor_name: Global average product energy intensity EF
emission_factor_source: IEA Global Average / product energy intensity
data_quality_notes: Global average energy intensity used across all product types. No product-specific measurements. Assumes 4-year product lifetime and global average grid.
recommended_improvement: Conduct product-level energy measurement for top 3 SKUs. Use regional grid factors weighted by sales geography.

category_name: End of life treatment of sold products
data_quality_notes: Recycling rate assumed at EU average (42%). No data on actual end-of-life pathways for products sold outside EU. Landfill vs recycling split is estimated.
recommended_improvement: Partner with take-back scheme operators to collect actual end-of-life data. Commission e-waste study for APAC markets.
